rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Vitest config patterns referencing non-existent test files cause tests to silently become no-ops — build stays green with 0 tests run.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Task plans that include creating new test files must verify the files actually exist, not just that the code they test was created.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"PRs must include ALL files referenced in the task — failing to create tests described in the task leaves the task incomplete regardless of other changes.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"JSDoc contract on a utility must match what ALL callers actually do; if one caller's format differs, the contract is wrong and needs updating.","scope":"src/lib/latex-parser"}]}
